conservative.name: Death's Head
conservative.requirements:
Used By: Exalted Champion of Nurgle
Target within medium range

success.description: You hurl a skull filled with a stew of unspeakable corruption. The skull strikes the target for normal damage, then explodes. The target and all engaged with him must make an Easy (1d) Resilience (To) check or suffer 1 corruption (and suffer 1 corruption per they roll, pass or fail)

boon.description: All characters in the target's engagement suffer 1 fatigue and 1 stress
Add to the dice pool of the Resilience check to avoid corruption

chaosStar.description: Assuming this action is successful, the skull hits a different (unintended) target within medium range

reckless.name: Death's Head
reckless.requirements:
Used By: Exalted Champion of Nurgle
Target within medium range

success.description: The champion hurls a skull filled with a stew of virulent poxes. The skull strikes the target for normal damage, then explodes. The target and all engaged with him must make Disease 1 checks or become infected by a disease with the Filth or Miasma traits

boon.description: All characters in the target's engagement suffer 1 fatigue
All characters in the target's engagement suffer 1 stress
All characters in the target's engagement suffer 1 corruption

chaosStar.description: Assuming this action is successful, the skull hits a different (unintended) target within medium range
